data.name: Hella Stonks
data.detailed_description:
Fine lad Raspislaw inherited a house – cause for celebration, one might think! But before he knew it, he found himself standing before the Duchess, saddled with a debt he never took on. Where did the debt come from? Hard to say when the Duchess is flaunting those generous assets of hers.

Good thing the house came with something far more interesting than any treasure – an artifact that clouds the minds of every woman nearby and makes their knees go weak. And suddenly it's not just the Duchess taking a keen interest in Raspislaw's "goods". Caught between a domineering noblewoman, a bashful imp-ette, and a lizard girl who's always up for a drink, our hero won't be bored for a single moment.

Expect:

  • A true tale of how inheritance leads a fine young man straight into sin

  • A stock trading mini-game – risk it all and claim your reward in the form of hot animated and voiced sex scenes

  • A branching story full of betrayals, schemes, and shady financial dealings

  • A domineering Duchess, a shy Imp-ette, and a wild lizard girl – each with her own plans for our hero!

data.short_description: Inheriting a house from your grandfather is always a joy! But along with the house came uninvited debts, hot-blooded women, and troubles nobody asked for. An erotic visual novel with a stock trading mini-game – where there's no getting to the women without a little sin!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 顯示卡: 512MB+
